# Engineering Team Roster — Q1 2026

This document lists active team leads and their reporting lines as of the start
of Q1 2026. For the full org chart, see the internal wiki.

## Platform Team

**Team Lead:** Jane Doe
**Manager:** Bob Smith

Jane Doe joined the Platform team in 2023 after transferring from the Data
Infrastructure group. She is responsible for the reliability roadmap and owns
the on-call rotation schedule. Bob Smith oversees both the Platform and Developer
Experience teams and reports directly to the VP of Engineering.

Escalation path: jane doe → bob smith → VP Engineering

> Note: All-caps references such as JANE DOE may appear in legacy system exports,
> approval forms, and compliance documents generated before 2025. The system of
> record uses canonical mixed-case names; JANE DOE and jane doe both resolve to
> the same identity record.

## Data Team

**Team Lead:** Maria Garcia

Maria Garcia leads a team of seven engineers working on the data warehouse
modernisation project. She joined from an external hire in late 2022 and has
since grown the team from two to seven. Maria coordinates closely with Jane Doe
on shared infrastructure dependencies.

## Developer Experience Team

**Team Lead:** (vacant — search in progress)
**Interim Lead:** Bob Smith

Bob Smith is currently covering the Developer Experience team on an interim basis
while the hiring process for a permanent lead is underway. Target start date for
the new hire is 2026-04-01.
